title: Due Diligence Audit
subheadline: Independent technical verification for secure investments.
description: Thorough technical and financial project auditing.
fullDescription: We perform meticulous due diligence audits to assess the current status, risks, and compliance of projects, providing stakeholders with transparent and actionable insights.
painPoints: Investors and acquiring firms face immense risk when stepping into existing projects with unknown technical liabilities, unverified billings, or compliance gaps.
approach: Acting as the Lender's Engineer, we conduct forensic technical audits, verify structural integrity, scrutinize financial expenditure against physical progress, and identify critical regulatory risks.

caseStudy.title: Kabeli-B HEP
caseStudy.description: A run-of-river hydroelectric project located in eastern Nepal, providing clean energy to the national grid. This strategic project demonstrates excellence in sustainable energy development with comprehensive technical audit and supervision.

testimonial.quote: CEC's due diligence report saved us from a disastrous acquisition. Their technical depth and financial acumen are unmatched.
testimonial.author: Bipin Karki
testimonial.title: Managing Partner
